---
title: "testing-cultural-tightness-across-fd-nonfd-hazards"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)

ds_FA <- read_csv("sharing-dataset-for-analysis.csv")

tl <- read_csv("../minerva/Tight-Loose/Datasets/DT-TL-FinalData.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    OWC = str_trim(OWC, side = c("both"))
  )

ds <- full_join(ds_FA, tl, by = c("OWC"))
```

# Food destroying
```{r}
fd_tl <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final")]), ]
```

```{r}
ggplot(fd_tl, aes(x = disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")

# sensitivity analysis
fd_tl$z_sev <- scale(fd_tl$disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)

fd_tl_trim <- fd_tl[abs(fd_tl$z_sev) <= 2, ]


ggplot(fd_tl_trim, aes(x = disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")
```

```{r}
fd_tl_trim <- fd_tl_trim %>%
  mutate(
    General_TL5B_pref_final = ordered(General_TL5B_pref_final,
      levels = c(1, 1.5, 1.75, 2, 2.25, 2.5, 2.75, 3, 3.25, 3.5, 3.75, 4))
  )


mod_fd_tl <- brm(
  formula = General_TL5B_pref_final ~ disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA + mo(ea033),
  data = fd_tl_trim,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95),
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)

summary(mod_fd_tl)
```

```{r}
# plot(mod_fd_tl, type = "coef")

c_effects_plot <- conditional_effects(mod_fd_tl, categorical = TRUE)
c_effects_plot
```



# Boxplot between food destroying hazard exposures and cultural tightness
```{r}
fd_tl_bp <- fd_tl_trim %>%
  mutate(
    tl_bin = factor(if_else(General_TL5B_pref_final > 2.5, 1, 0))
  )

ggplot(fd_tl_bp, aes(x = tl_bin, y = disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    x = "Tight-Loose (binned)",
    y = "Disaster H9a Severity Exposure (EP 30)",
    title = "Disaster Severity Exposure by Tight-Loose Category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
  
  
  
```











```{r}
# in the our better nature paper, there was a positive relationship between seasonal food sharing and severe non-fd hazards
hypothesis(mod_fd_tl, "disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA < 0") # they do!

drawsfd <- as_draws_df(mod_fd_tl)

# Plot for Sev
pfd_tl <- drawsfd %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_h9a_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "mediumseagreen", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Weighted exposure to food-destroying hazards)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

pfd_tl
```


# Severe non-food destroying frequency
```{r}
sevnfd_tl <- ds[complete.cases(ds[, c("disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA", "General_TL5B_pref_final")]), ]
```

```{r}
ggplot(sevnfd_tl, aes(x = disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")

# sensitivity analysis
sevnfd_tl$z_sev <- scale(sevnfd_tl$disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA)

sevnfd_tl_trim <- sevnfd_tl[abs(sevnfd_tl$z_sev) <= 2, ]


ggplot(sevnfd_tl_trim, aes(x = disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA, y = General_TL5B_pref_final)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.05, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#66c2a4")
```

```{r}
sevnfd_tl_trim <- sevnfd_tl_trim %>%
  mutate(
    General_TL5B_pref_final = ordered(General_TL5B_pref_final,
      levels = c(1, 1.5, 1.75, 2, 2.25, 2.5, 2.75, 3, 3.25, 3.5, 3.75, 4))
  )


mod_sevnfd_tl <- brm(
    formula = General_TL5B_pref_final ~ disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA + mo(ea033),
  data = sevnfd_tl_trim,
  family = cumulative(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2.5), class = "b"),  # Weakly informative normal priors for the coefficients
    prior(cauchy(0, 1), class = "Intercept")  # Weakly informative Cauchy prior for the intercept
  )
)

summary(mod_sevnfd_tl)
```

```{r}
# plot(mod_fd_tl, type = "coef")

c_effects_plot <- conditional_effects(mod_sevnfd_tl, categorical = TRUE)
c_effects_plot
```

```{r}

hypothesis(mod_sevnfd_tl, "disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA > 0")

draws_sevnfd <- as_draws_df(mod_sevnfd_tl)

# Plot for Sev
psevnfd_tl <- draws_sevnfd %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = b_disaster_nonfd_sev_exposure_30_IA)) +
  geom_density(fill = "mediumseagreen", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "Cultural Tightness",
    x = expression(beta ~ "(Severe non food-destroying hazard frequency)"),
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

psevnfd_tl
```
